author: CasaOS Team
description: SickChill is an automatic Video Library Manager for TV Shows. It watches for new episodes of your favorite shows, and when they are posted it does its magic: automatic torrent/nzb searching, downloading, and processing at the qualities you want.
tagline: Automatic video library manager for TV Shows

releaseNotes.en_US:
- 2023.6.27 has an empty GitHub release body, so changes were checked against the upstream tag compare.
- The compare includes dependency updates for Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk, and types-setuptools.
- Fixes and updates include site-message dismissal, minimum leech time, TL category cleanup, generic.py, torrentleech.py, and bencode logging handling.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- 2023.6.27 has an empty GitHub release body, so changes were checked against the upstream tag compare.
- The compare includes dependency updates for Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk, and types-setuptools.
- Fixes and updates include site-message dismissal, minimum leech time, TL category cleanup, generic.py, torrentleech.py, and bencode logging handling.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- 2023.6.27 ha un corpo della versione GitHub vuoto, quindi le modifiche sono state verificate rispetto al confronto dei tag upstream.
- Il confronto include aggiornamenti delle dipendenze per Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk e types-setuptools.
- Le correzioni e gli aggiornamenti includono l'eliminazione di site-message, tempo minimo di sanguisuga, pulizia della categoria TL, generic.py, torrentleech.py e gestione della registrazione del bencode.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- 2023.6.27 har en tom GitHub utgivelsestekst, så endringer ble sjekket mot oppstrøms tag-sammenligning.
- Sammenligningen inkluderer avhengighetsoppdateringer for poesi/garn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk og types-setuptools.
- Rettelser og oppdateringer inkluderer site-message avskjedigelse, minimum igletid, TL kategori opprydding, generic.py, torrentleech.py og bencode logging håndtering.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- 2023.6.27 的 GitHub Release 正文为空，因此变更依据上游标签 compare 核对。
- compare 中包含 Poetry/Yarn、urllib3、workbox-webpack-plugin、Snyk 和 types-setuptools 的依赖更新。
- 修复和更新包括站点消息关闭、最小做种时间、TL 分类清理、generic.py、torrentleech.py 以及 bencode 日志处理。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- 2023.6.27 の GitHub Release 本文は空のため、変更は上流タグの compare で確認されています。
- compare には Poetry/Yarn、urllib3、workbox-webpack-plugin、Snyk、types-setuptools の依存関係更新が含まれます。
- 修正と更新には、サイトメッセージの閉じる処理、最小 leech 時間、TL カテゴリ整理、generic.py、torrentleech.py、bencode ログ処理が含まれます。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- 2023.6.27의 GitHub Release 본문이 비어 있어 변경 사항은 업스트림 태그 compare로 확인했습니다.
- compare에는 Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk, types-setuptools 의존성 업데이트가 포함됩니다.
- 수정 및 업데이트에는 사이트 메시지 닫기, 최소 leech 시간, TL 카테고리 정리, generic.py, torrentleech.py, bencode 로깅 처리가 포함됩니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- Le corps du GitHub Release 2023.6.27 est vide, les changements ont donc été vérifiés avec le compare du tag amont.
- Le compare inclut des mises à jour de dépendances pour Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk et types-setuptools.
- Les correctifs et mises à jour couvrent la fermeture des messages de site, le temps minimal de leech, le nettoyage de catégories TL, generic.py, torrentleech.py et la journalisation bencode.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- Der GitHub-Release-Text für 2023.6.27 ist leer, daher wurden die Änderungen gegen den Upstream-Tag-Compare geprüft.
- Der Compare enthält Abhängigkeitsupdates für Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk und types-setuptools.
- Korrekturen und Updates betreffen das Schließen von Site-Meldungen, minimale Leech-Zeit, TL-Kategoriebereinigung, generic.py, torrentleech.py und bencode-Logging.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- 2023.6.27 har en tom GitHub release body, så ändringar kontrollerades mot uppströms taggjämförelse.
- Jämförelsen inkluderar beroendeuppdateringar för poesi/garn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk och types-setuptools.
- Fixningar och uppdateringar inkluderar site-message avskedande, minsta läcktid, TL kategorirensning, generic.py, torrentleech.py och bencode-loggningshantering.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το 2023.6.27 έχει ένα κενό σώμα απελευθέρωσης GitHub, επομένως οι αλλαγές ελέγχθηκαν σε σχέση με τη σύγκριση της ετικέτας ανάντη.
- Η σύγκριση περιλαμβάνει ενημερώσεις εξάρτησης για Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk και types-setuptools.
- Οι διορθώσεις και οι ενημερώσεις περιλαμβάνουν την απόρριψη site-message, τον ελάχιστο χρόνο βδέλλας, τον καθαρισμό κατηγορίας TL, τον χειρισμό καταγραφής generic.py, torrentleech.py και τον χειρισμό καταγραφής κωδικών.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- 2023.6.27 ima prazno tijelo izdanja GitHub, pa su promjene provjerene prema uzvodnoj oznaci za usporedbu.
- Usporedba uključuje ažuriranja ovisnosti za Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk i types-setuptools.
- Popravci i ažuriranja uključuju odbacivanje site-message, minimalno vrijeme pijavice, čišćenje kategorije TL, generic.py, torrentleech.py i rukovanje bilježenjem bencode-a.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- 2023.6.27 tem um corpo de versão GitHub vazio, pelo que as alterações foram verificadas em relação à comparação da etiqueta upstream.
- A comparação inclui atualizações de dependências para Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk e types-setuptools.
- As correções e atualizações incluem dispensa de site-message, tempo mínimo de sanguessuga, limpeza de categoria TL, generic.py, torrentleech.py e manipulação de registos de código bencode.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- 2023.6.27 имеет пустое тело релиза GitHub, поэтому изменения проверялись по сравнению с вышестоящим тегом.
- Сравнение включает обновления зависимостей для Poetry/Yarn, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk и types-setuptools.
- Исправления и обновления включают увольнение site-message, минимальное время восстановления, очистку категории TL, generic.py, torrentleech.py и обработку журналирования Bencode.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- 2023.6.27 boş bir GitHub yayın gövdesine sahip olduğundan değişiklikler yukarı akış etiketi karşılaştırmasına göre kontrol edildi.
- Karşılaştırma, Şiir/İplik, urllib3, workbox-webpack-plugin, Snyk ve types-setuptools için bağımlılık güncellemelerini içerir.
- Düzeltmeler ve güncellemeler arasında site-message görevden alma, minimum sülük süresi, TL kategori temizliği, generic.py, torrentleech.py ve bencode günlük tutma işlemleri yer alıyor.

title: Sickchill
